---
name: Missing tactical graphic
about: Request a MIL-STD-2525E graphic the library doesn't render yet
title: 'Graphic: '
labels: graphic
---

**Graphic name**
<!-- e.g. "Attack by Fire Position". Use the doctrinal name. -->

**Doctrinal reference**
<!-- FM 1-02.2 figure or table number, or the MIL-STD-2525E SIDC. This is what a
     reviewer checks the shape against, so please be specific. -->

**Base geometry**
<!-- What does the user draw? LineString / Point / Polygon -->

**Amplifiers**
<!-- Which fields does it display? label, DTGs, echelon, altitude, ... -->

**Anything unusual about it**
<!-- Fixed aspect ratio? Zoom-invariant gap? Label that must scale with the
     graphic rather than the map? These are the things that take the time. -->
